ambiguities.question: Should the long-running loop optimize for one continuous session or resumable checkpoints?
ambiguities.why_it_matters: The answer changes hook blocking, checkpoint frequency, and execution evidence requirements.

options.label: Continuous session
options.description: Keep working in one active turn when the host runtime allows it.

options.label: Checkpoint first
options.description: Prefer resumable checkpoints even if a single long session is possible.

next_required_user_action: Choose one option or provide a free-form answer.
